messages.content: I want you to act as an English translator, spelling corrector and improver. I will speak to you in any language and you will detect the language, translate it and answer in the corrected and improved version of my text, in English. I want you to replace my simplified A0-level words and sentences with more beautiful and elegant, upper level English words and sentences. Keep the meaning same, but make them more literary. I want you to only reply the correction, the improvements and nothing else, do not write explanations. My first sentence is "너무 러프하게 그렸네요...멋진 디자인!!!!!"

"You drew it so rough... magnificent design!!!!" 

"You have drawn it in a rather unpolished manner... What a splendid and exceptional design!"
"Los aborígenes de Canarias siempre iban bien fresquitos/as"

"The indigenous people of the Canaries always kept themselves refreshingly cool."

Or,

"The aboriginals of Canarias were known for their breezy attire and laidback style."
"공룡 몰래 하자"
"Let's do it secretly from the dinosaurs."
"これ衝撃的だったからずっと擦ってるけどもしプトレマイオスかセレウコスの絵であの顔だったらAIすげーって言ってたと思う　大王だったから文句を言っています"

"I have been rubbing it continuously because it was shocking. If the face on the drawing was that of Ptolemy or Seleucus, I would have exclaimed, 'Wow, the AI is awesome!' However, since it is that of the Great King, I am complaining."
"腕組みが『トレインスポッティング』な ラーメン屋さん"
"A ramen restaurant with a 'Trainspotting'-esque arm-crossing pose."

"おっしゃー！さてさて元気いっぱいいってみよー！

勝利の女神:NIKKE
アニス

製作:
@NeccoLaboratory"

"Let's gooo! Full of energy, shall we give it a try?

Goddess of Victory: NIKKE Anis
Production: @NeccoLaboratory"
"たのむ、誰か来てくれ"
"I beg of you, anyone, please come and help me."
"美少女着ぐるみ（びしょうじょきぐるみ）"
"Beautiful girl mascot costume (bishoujo kigurumi)."
"もう気がついてるとは思うけど、大型連休は今日までよ。"
"I think you already realize it, but the Golden Week holidays end today."
"遅ればせながら、端午の節句に因んだ写真を御披露。"
"Belatedly, I am pleased to share a photo inspired by the Children's Day Festival."
"アニメスタイルの着ぐるみの例"
"An example of a mascot costume in anime style."

"In meiner allerersten Mittelalter-Vorlesung meinte der Dozent irgendwann mal begeistert, dass wir alle beim Tod der Queen und Krönung ihres Nachfolgers gut aufpassen sollten, weil wir dem Mittelalter nie wieder so nah kommen würden, und gerade denke ich ziemlich oft daran zurück."

"During my very first medieval lecture, the professor once exclaimed, with great enthusiasm, that we should all pay close attention to the death of the Queen and the coronation of her successor. He said that we would never again be so close to the Middle Ages. Lately, I have been thinking about that statement quite frequently."

"Previous civilizations declining came from the fact that they were playing a zero-sum thing with a lack of modern technology. The modern global society is economically positive-sum, which while bad for the environment currently is very good for increasing quality of life and civilization."

"The fall of past civilizations occurred because they engaged in a zero-sum game without modern technology. However, the current global society operates on an economically positive-sum game, which although detrimental to the environment, has greatly increased the quality of life and civilization."
